text:
A new method for quantifying flake scar organisation on cores using orientation statistics

Data and R code for reproducing the results presented in 'in “A new method for quantifying flake scar organisation on cores using orientation statistics” by Lin et al.
title: A new method for quantifying flake scar organisation on cores using orientation statistics

text:
Birth and death dates for individuals of twelve Rhododendron species

Birth (planting) date, depart date, and depart type (C = censored (not dead), D = dead), for individuals of twelve Rhododendron species planted at the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh.
title: Birth and death dates for individuals of twelve Rhododendron species
